nodes.name: Trigger: Generate Proposal
nodes.notes: POST with: company_name, industry, arr, employee_count, sales_team_size, crm, website, challenges, current_state, desired_outcomes, timeline, budget_signals, stakeholders, source, scope_tier, duration, investment, billing_frequency

values.name: system_prompt
values.value: You are a senior RevOps consultant generating tailored proposals for B2B SaaS companies. Your proposals are specific to the prospect's situation (not generic templates), outcome-focused, professionally structured, and confident in tone.

values.name: user_prompt

parameters.subject: =📄 Proposal Ready: {{ $('Trigger: Generate Proposal').first().json.body.company_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Proposal and companion email draft are ready for review:

  • Proposal Google Doc: created in Proposals folder
  • Companion email: created as Gmail draft

Review, finalize formatting, and send when ready.
